title: In /Users/masayuki/Dev/cursorvers/claude-config, verify branch/commit existence, whether commit 1c8023c7 is on feature/phase0-handoff-pipeline, and whether there is evidence it was pushed. Use local git evidence only unless remote check is necessary. Return concise findings. Do not edit files.
summary_text: Findings in `/Users/masayuki/Dev/cursorvers/claude-config`: 1. Commit `1c8023c7` does not exist in this local object database. - `git rev-parse --verify --quiet 1c8023c7^{commit}` failed. - `git cat-file -t 1c8023c7` returned `COMMIT_LOCAL:no`. 2. `feature/phase0-handoff-pipeline` branch is not present locally. - `git show-ref --verify --heads refs/heads/feature/phase0-handoff-pipeline` failed (`not a valid ref`). - `git branch --contains 1c8023c7` did not list that branch. - `git branch -a | rg ...` showed no matching branch name. 3. Evidence of push cannot be confirmed from this environment. - Remote checks to `origin` failed due DNS/network: `Could not resolve host: github.com`. - Commands used: `git ls-remote --heads origin feature/phase0-handoff-pipeline` and `git fetch --dry-run origin ...` both failed before contacting GitHub. Conclusion: with local evidence only, `1c8023c7` is not on `feature/phase0-handoff-pipeline` and there is no local proof it was pushed.
